mapper.select: SELECT * FROM roles WHERE status = '1' ORDER BY created_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO roles (role_name, role_key, description, status, created_time, updated_time) VALUES (#{roleName}, #{roleKey}, #{description}, #{status}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE roles SET role_name = #{roleName}, role_key = #{roleKey}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, updated_time = #{updatedTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT r.* FROM roles r INNER JOIN user_roles ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.status = '1' ORDER BY r.created_time DESC
